mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_inventory mi JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE 1=1
AND ( mi.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT inventory_id, material_id, quantity, lot_no, expiration_date, received_date, warehouse_code, status, inventory_status, last_updated, last_movement_date, is_discarded, discarded_date, discard_reason FROM material_inventory WHERE material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY expiration_date ASC
